// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace AotSample;

public partial class SampleAotSchema
{
    protected override void Configure()
    {
        AddAotType<global::GraphQL.Types.StringGraphType>();
        AddAotType<global::GraphQL.Types.GuidGraphType>();

        RegisterType(typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.StringGraphType));
        RegisterType(typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.GuidGraphType));

        RemapType(typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.IdGraphType), typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.GuidGraphType));

    }
}
